headline: Huntington Cadence Merger Tests Integration Execution And Growth Ambitions
summary: Huntington Bancshares (NasdaqGS:HBAN) has finalized its merger with Cadence Bank. The company is preparing for a full customer account conversion following the merger. The conversion will shift Cadence customer accounts onto Huntington's systems. For you as an investor, this merger joins two regional banking platforms with a focus on traditional banking services such as deposits, lending and treasury management. It comes at a time when regional banks are adjusting to tighter funding...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Huntington Bancshares, Raises Price Target to $23
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $21 to $23.
